meta.summary: DSSP 4.6.1 mkdssp command-line runtime for assigning protein secondary structure from atomic coordinates.
meta.description: DSSP 4.6.1 mkdssp command-line runtime for assigning protein secondary structure from atomic coordinates.

test: grep -Fx "DSSP 4.6.1" /opt/dssp/share/doc/dssp/source.txt >/dev/null && grep -F "5ddb8274f03ac0338adffcd661989f515fffb95d40afca404cf2677024256ae3" /opt/dssp/share/doc/dssp/source.txt >/dev/null && grep -F "ccd_components_cif_sha256=ab05819c85e2b8005dfc1c3e1ba9580cca3b0482aea26e85f5cf9cb595e7895f" /opt/dssp/share/doc/dssp/source.txt >/dev/null && test -s /opt/dssp/share/libcifpp/mmcif_pdbx.dic && test -s /opt/dssp/share/libcifpp/dssp-extension.dic && test -s /opt/dssp/share/libcifpp/components.cif
mkdssp --version 2>&1 | grep -F "mkdssp version 4.6.1" >/dev/null && mkdssp --help 2>&1 | grep -F "Usage: mkdssp" >/dev/null && mkdssp --help 2>&1 | grep -F -- "--output-format" >/dev/null
ldd "$(command -v mkdssp)" 2>&1 | grep -F "not found" && exit 1 || true

tmp=/tmp/taf-dssp-mmcif-smoke-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; mkdssp /opt/dssp/share/testdata/1cbs.cif.gz "$tmp/1cbs-annotated.cif" > "$tmp/stdout" 2> "$tmp/stderr"; test -s "$tmp/1cbs-annotated.cif"; grep -F '_struct_conf.conf_type_id' "$tmp/1cbs-annotated.cif" >/dev/null; grep -F '_software.name' "$tmp/1cbs-annotated.cif" >/dev/null; if grep -F "Configuration error" "$tmp/stderr"; then exit 1; fi; rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-dssp-legacy-smoke-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; mkdssp --output-format=dssp /opt/dssp/share/testdata/pdb1cbs.ent.gz "$tmp/1cbs.dssp" > "$tmp/stdout" 2> "$tmp/stderr"; test -s "$tmp/1cbs.dssp"; grep -F "Secondary Structure Definition by the program DSSP" "$tmp/1cbs.dssp" >/dev/null; grep -F "TOTAL NUMBER OF RESIDUES" "$tmp/1cbs.dssp" >/dev/null; if grep -F "Configuration error" "$tmp/stderr"; then exit 1; fi; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: DSSP
upstream.citation: Hekkelman ML, Salmoral DA, Perrakis A, Joosten RP. DSSP 4: FAIR annotation of protein secondary structure. Protein Science. 2025;34(8):e70208. Also cite Kabsch W, Sander C. Biopolymers. 1983;22:2577-2637 for the original algorithm.
